name: MarkItDown
examples_zh: 把这份PDF产品白皮书转换成Markdown，并保留标题层级、表格和图片OCR文字
批量将会议PPT和Word纪要转成Markdown，输出到同一个资料目录
从这个网页和配套音频中提取内容，生成可检索的Markdown笔记
examples_en: Convert this product whitepaper PDF to Markdown while preserving headings, tables, and OCR text from images
Batch-convert the meeting PowerPoint and Word minutes into Markdown files in one notes folder
Extract content from this URL and its accompanying audio, then create searchable Markdown notes
